description_long: This is a medium-sized, matte black bowl with a wide, shallow profile and a smooth, gently curving rim. The bowl is filled with a variety of individually wrapped candies in blue, yellow, and red wrappers, giving it a festive and inviting appearance. On one side of the bowl, there is a white label with playful, handwritten text that reads, 'take no more when one, please.' The bowl's surface appears hard and non-reflective, suggesting it is made of ceramic or plastic. The candies inside are glossy and colorful, contrasting with the bowl's dark, understated exterior. The overall look is clean and modern, suitable for casual or communal settings.
description: A matte black bowl filled with colorful, individually wrapped candies and a playful label on one side. The bowl has a smooth, hard surface and a modern, inviting appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bowl's label with text and a clear view of the colorful candies inside.
description_view_1: Side view without the label, focusing on the bowl's smooth, matte black exterior and the candy contents.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the bowl's curved shape and the distribution of candies, with no visible label.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the bowl's depth and the mix of candies, with the label not visible.
attribute_location: kitchen counter, office break room, or communal dining area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or offering candy to guests or passersby
attribute_decorative_patterns: handwritten text label on the front side
